description: OpenFIGI provides identifiers and reference metadata for financial instruments, including mapping between third-party market identifiers and FIGIs. It also supports instrument search and filtering over Open Symbology data.
summary: OpenFIGI exposes one public REST API with an OpenAPI schema at `https://api.openfigi.com/schema`; it supports anonymous access with lower rate limits and an optional API key in `X-OPENFIGI-APIKEY` for higher limits.
